title: LIVE final-phase: Stage-2 roll never completes (BTC sub-min residual) -> book sod re-anchor never fires -> FX book flat-locked by stale daily-kill until UTC day-roll
why: Final-phase arm set BTCUSD target=16.512077 lots. Book chunk-fills to 16.51 but residual 0.002077 rounds below volume_min 0.01, so the roll-rebalance order is SKIPPED every tick and the stage-2 ROLL never reaches completed state. _reanchor_book/rebaseline_book_anchor (re-anchors sod_equity on round-boundary roll COMPLETION) never fires. sod_equity stuck at 1,019,744 (00:00 UTC Jun-24 pre-pair-trade high) vs book_equity ~1,000,000 -> book-only daily-loss -1.94% > portfolio_kill 1.5% -> FX/metals book held FLAT (stage-2 legs exempt, correct). Self-heals at 00:00 UTC day-roll. Net ~3h FX-flat gap in the 48h final.
value_rationale: Silently disables the FX survival book (Sharpe/Drawdown lever) for hours whenever a round-boundary arm leaves a sub-min residual.
scope: FIX: treat roll COMPLETE when every leg within one volume_step of target (ignore sub-volume_min residual) so _reanchor_book fires; OR decouple sod re-anchor from roll completion. Add regression test with fractional target rounding below volume_min.
recommendation: Decoupling the sod re-anchor from exact roll completion is the durable fix.
